---
agent: instructions-generator
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the content. The instructions should be concise, clear, and formatted in markdown.Make sure to update AGENTS.md to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided, please prompt user to give more details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to the document.
